name: Mixpanel API
what_it_does: Product analytics platform for tracking user events and behaviors, building funnels and retention analyses, with Ingestion and Query APIs for agent-driven data pipelines.
use_cases: Ingesting custom events from agent workflows via Track API
Querying funnel completion rates and retention data
Exporting raw event data for downstream processing
Creating and updating user profiles with custom properties
Triggering cohort exports for targeting campaigns
not_for: Real-time dashboarding at low latency (data processing has delays)
Teams needing HIPAA-compliant analytics without Business plan
best_when: You need to track product usage events, analyze user behavior funnels, and query analytics data programmatically from agents.
avoid_when: You need real-time data or primarily do infrastructure/ops analytics.

auth.notes: Ingestion uses project token (public). Query API uses service account credentials (username:secret) with Basic auth. Export API uses API secret. Three different auth methods for different APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 20M monthly events free on Starter plan
pricing.notes: Generous free tier for event ingestion. Query API access and data export require paid plans. Pricing is event-volume based.

performance.rate_limits: Ingestion: 2000 events/second per project; Query API: 60 requests/hour on free

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Ingestion API returns minimal error detail (200 with error codes in body). Query API has better error messages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Events can have an $insert_id for deduplication within a 7-day window. Profile updates are idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Ingestion API always returns 200 even on failure - must check response body for errors
Three different authentication methods across different APIs (token, service account, API secret)
Query API has strict hourly rate limits on free/growth plans
Data export lag: events typically available for query after 3-5 minute delay
JQL (JavaScript Query Language) required for complex queries - not SQL
